title: Calf-Intestinal Alkaline Phosphatase Treatment in situ-Killinger 2024
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9sojj","text":"Alpha-synuclein phosphorylated at serine 129 (PSER129) occurs in two pools, non-aggregated (physiological) and aggregated (disease). This protocol allows for the selective dephosphorylation of non-aggregated PSER129 and enhances the specificity and sensitivity immunodetection of aggregated PSER129. Thus, this protocol can be used to differentiate physiological from aggregated PSER129.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"vq7p","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"avsem","text":"For subsequent detection of non-aggregated-(physiological PS129) we have observed that the blocking buffer component bovine serum album (BSA) fraction V from several sources interferes with physiological PS129 detection. We have had success with MP Biomedicals AlbumiNZ Protease-reduced BSA, as well as omitting BSA from blocking buffers. We have not determined the source of interference, but it may include low level proteases or phosphatases.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Wash free-floating tissue (3 x 10 minutes) in dilution media. Dilution media: %s %s
Incubate the samples with 1% Triton X-100 in DM for 00:10:00 .
Wash in DM 00:10:00 .
Wash the tissues in CIAP buffer (2x10 minutes). CIAP buffer: %s %s

Incubate the tissues with CIAP at a dilution of 1:333 for 24:00:00 at 37 °C on a shaker. CIAP concentration per bottle: 20 u/μl (Promega, Cat.# M2825). In 500 µL CIAP buffer, add 1.5 µL CIAP (30 units).
Wash in DM (2 x 10 minutes).
Heat water bath to 80 °C - 85 °C 01:30:00 before the antigen retrieval step.

Place the dish containing sodium citrate buffer in the water bath and heat it for 00:10:00 . Sodium Citrate Buffer, pH 6.0 (1L): 2.94 g Sodium citrate-Trisodium salt (Dihydrate) in 1000 mL DI water. pH 6.0. Add 0.5 mL Tween-20. Mix well.
Wash the tissues in sodium citrate buffer 00:10:00 .
Incubate the tissues in the heated sodium citrate buffer for 00:30:00 .
Cool the dish containing tissues to Room temperature (at least 00:20:00 ).
Wash in DM for 10 min x 2 times.
Tissues are now ready for downstream assays.
Wash free-floating tissue 00:10:00 in dilution media (1/3).
Wash free-floating tissue 00:10:00 in dilution media (2/3).
Wash free-floating tissue 00:10:00 in dilution media (3/3).
Wash the tissues in CIAP buffer 00:10:00 (1/2).
Wash the tissues in CIAP buffer 00:10:00 (2/2).
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 (1/2).
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 (2/2) .
creator: Bryan Killinger
